![R Logo](https://www.r-project.org/Rlogo.png){width=100px style="float:left; margin-right:1rem;"}
![RLAB Logo](https://github.com/bhelsel/RLAB/raw/main/images/rlab.png){width=150px style="float:right; margin-left:1rem; mix-blend-mode: multiply;"}

# R for Lifestyle and Brain Health

Build R programming skills to support research.

---

> **STARTS JUNE 24!** Hands-on journey into R for data science and advanced programming.

---

## What We'll Cover

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="50%"}
### R for Data Science
Build skills to wrangle, visualize, and model data.

- 📊 Import and transform data
- 📈 Visualize data with ggplot2
- 🧠 Write and use your own functions
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
### Advanced R
Take your R skills to the next level.

- ⚙️ Object-Oriented Programming
- 🧩 Metaprogramming
- 🚀 Improving Code Performance
:::

::::

---

## Why This Course?

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="50%"}
**Why this course?**

- Connects early-career researchers
- Bridges data & domain expertise
- Build practical, career-advancing skills
- Advances research software development
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
**You'll walk away with:**

- Strong programming skills in R
- Ability to develop new research tools
- Skills to build reproducible workflows
- Confidence using R to support research
:::

::::

---

*Connect with other scientists interested in learning R to support lifestyle and brain health research.*
